## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do? One sentence. -->

## Type of change
- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] docs: documentation
- [ ] test: tests
- [ ] chore: tooling/deps

## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] New code has corresponding tests
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits format
